## 变更类型 / Type of Change
- [ ] Bug 修复 / Bug fix
- [ ] 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] 性能优化 / Performance improvement
- [ ] 文档更新 / Documentation update
- [ ] 重构 / Refactor
- [ ] 其他 / Other

## 描述 / Description
<!-- 简要描述你的变更及原因 / Briefly describe what changed and why -->

## 关联 Issue / Related Issues
<!-- 例如 Closes #123 / e.g. Closes #123 -->

## 测试 / Testing
- [ ] 所有现有测试通过 (547 tests) / All existing tests pass
- [ ] 添加了新测试 / Added new tests
- [ ] TypeScript 零错误 / Zero TypeScript errors

## 自查清单 / Checklist
- [ ] 代码已自行审查 / I have reviewed my own code
- [ ] 已更新相关文档 / I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] 变更不包含无关修改 / No unrelated changes are included
